title: Agent Trust Manifest
description: Declares what an AI agent can access, what it knows, and what risks it carries. Intended to be committed alongside agent code and reviewed before deployment.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Use '0.1.0' for files conforming to the ClawMaven Open Governance Kit v0.1.0.

maintainer.description: The team or individual responsible for this agent.

runtime.description: The runtime or framework this agent uses.

model.description: The LLM or model powering this agent.

data_access.description: Describes what data sources this agent can read from or write to.

reads_from.description: Data sources the agent reads from.

writes_to.description: Data stores the agent can write to.

pii_access.description: Whether this agent has access to personally identifiable information.

sensitive_categories.description: Categories of sensitive data this agent may encounter.

tool_access.description: List of tools or capabilities registered with this agent.

write_capable.description: Whether this tool can modify data or trigger external side effects.

requires_approval.description: Whether human approval is required before this tool may be called.

outbound_allowed.description: Whether the agent can make outbound network requests.

allowed_domains.description: Allowlist of domains the agent may contact. Empty means no restriction (if outbound_allowed is true).

blocked_domains.description: Domains the agent must never contact.

secrets_policy.description: How this agent handles secrets and credentials.

accesses_secrets.description: Whether this agent requires access to any secrets, API keys, or credentials.

secret_store.description: Where secrets are retrieved from (e.g., env vars, vault, secrets manager).

secrets_logged.description: Whether secrets may appear in logs. Should always be false.

audit_policy.description: How agent activity is logged and audited.

retention_days.description: How long logs are retained in days.

run_reports_required.description: Whether a structured run report must be produced for every execution.

known_risks.description: Known risks or limitations of this agent, documented by the maintainer.

mitigation.description: How this risk is mitigated or accepted.

manifest_version.description: Version of this specific trust manifest document.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this manifest was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this manifest was last updated.
